subcodes.first_line: O thou whom God hath made one of His Hands among His creatures! The letter from Qazvin was read in the midst of the vast ocean [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من جعله الله من ایادی امره بین خلقه نامه قزوین در وسط دریای محیط قرائت
subcodes.subjects: @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @call to action, @suffering and imprisonment, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
